name: are-shapes-broadcastable-ndim-guard
description: Documents the pattern of adding an ndim guard to broadcasting compatibility checks so helpers self-document the no-dimension-reduction rule. Use when: (1) a broadcastability helper silently returns True for shape pairs where the target has fewer dimensions than the source, (2) you need to make a vacuous-loop bug self-documenting, (3) protecting downstream callers that rely on the helper directly.
